color.$description: Warm charcoal neutrals — Human green, steel blue, amber, coral, teal, and chart-only viz-extended hues

neutral.$description: Warm charcoal scale — cinematic amber-tinted darks to cream whites. Warm neutral tones for premium feel, OKLCH hue ~55deg.

tonal.$description: M3-style tonal surface primitives — warm neutrals tinted with Human green for surface-container hierarchy

dark-container.$description: warm neutral.150 + 4% human.500 — default card/panel surface

dark-container-high.$description: warm neutral.200 + 6% human.500 — elevated interactive surfaces

dark-container-highest.$description: warm neutral.250 + 8% human.500 — highest emphasis surfaces, active states

dark-dim.$description: Recessed surface — darker than bg for inset/well areas

dark-bright.$description: Prominent surface — lighter than elevated for hero/featured areas

light-container.$description: warm cream + 6% human.100 — default card/panel surface

light-container-high.$description: warm gray + 8% human.100 — elevated interactive surfaces

light-container-highest.$description: warm gray + 10% human.100 — highest emphasis surfaces

light-dim.$description: Recessed surface — warm light theme inset/well areas

light-bright.$description: Prominent surface — warm cream brightest level for hero/featured areas

teal.$description: Legacy ocean teal/aqua — retained for reference

seafoam.$description: Secondary — sea foam green for success states

coral.$description: Warm accent — coral for errors and warnings

blue.$description: Depth accent — steel blue for info states, data viz, and richness (500 #4A6FA5)

amber.$description: Warm secondary accent — amber/gold for highlights and featured content

viz-extended.$description: Supplementary hues — charts and illustrations only; not UI chrome or semantic status

crimson.$description: Chart series only — not error UI

blur.$description: Blur radius for backdrop-filter glass effects

categorical.$description: Ordered categorical series — 16 colors: core 1–8 plus viz-extended for dense charts

semantic.$description: Semantic tokens — warm charcoal theme (Quiet Mastery)

dark.$description: Dark theme — warm charcoal with Human green accents

surface-container.$description: M3 tonal surface — primary-tinted card/panel background

surface-container-high.$description: M3 tonal surface — elevated interactive surfaces

surface-container-highest.$description: M3 tonal surface — highest emphasis, active states

surface-dim.$description: Recessed surface below bg — wells, inset panels

surface-bright.$description: Prominent surface above elevated — hero sections, featured cards

text-secondary.$description: Informational text — WCAG AA 4.5:1 on dark surfaces

accent-text.$description: Human green for text on dark backgrounds

accent-secondary-text.$description: Amber accent for text on dark backgrounds

accent-tertiary-text.$description: Indigo accent for text on dark backgrounds

hover-overlay.$description: M3 tinted state layer — primary green tint on hover

pressed-overlay.$description: M3 tinted state layer — primary green tint on press

focus-overlay.$description: M3 tinted state layer — primary green tint on focus

dragged-overlay.$description: M3 tinted state layer — primary green tint while dragging

shadow-glow-blue.$description: Blue glow for chat focus/hover states

user-message-gradient.$description: Deep-to-vibrant blue gradient for user chat bubbles

surface-gradient.$description: Warm cream-to-dark gradient — warm inset highlight

surface-glow.$description: Ambient Human green glow at the top of cards — creates atmospheric depth

hero-gradient.$description: Atmospheric gradient — Human green to forest with steel blue depth

mesh-gradient.$value: radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(122,182,72,0.06) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 20%, rgba(99,102,241,0.04) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 80%, rgba(245,158,11,0.03) 0%, transparent 50%)
mesh-gradient.$description: Multi-point mesh gradient — Human green, steel blue, amber for cinematic depth

aurora-gradient.$description: Slow-rotating aurora for hero sections — ambient color wash

shadow-colored-accent.$description: Human green tinted shadow for accent-heavy elements

shadow-colored-warm.$description: Warm amber tinted shadow for elevated surfaces

light.$description: Light theme — warm cream surfaces, Human green accents, charcoal text

surface-container.$description: M3 tonal surface — green-tinted card/panel background

surface-container-high.$description: M3 tonal surface — elevated interactive surfaces

surface-container-highest.$description: M3 tonal surface — highest emphasis surfaces

surface-dim.$description: Recessed surface — light theme wells/inset panels

surface-bright.$description: Prominent surface — brightest level for hero/featured

text-secondary.$description: Informational text — WCAG AA 4.5:1 on warm light surfaces

accent-text.$description: WCAG AA: Human dark green for text on light backgrounds (4.5:1 contrast)

accent-secondary-text.$description: WCAG AA: amber accent for text on light backgrounds

accent-tertiary-text.$description: WCAG AA: steel blue accent for text on light backgrounds

hover-overlay.$description: M3 tinted state layer — Human green tint on hover

pressed-overlay.$description: M3 tinted state layer — Human green tint on press

focus-overlay.$description: M3 tinted state layer — Human green tint on focus

dragged-overlay.$description: M3 tinted state layer — Human green tint while dragging

shadow-card.$description: Clean, warm card shadow — premium feel

shadow-glow-accent.$description: Human green glow for hover/focus states

surface-gradient.$description: Warm cream to cream-gray — subtle depth on warm clean cards

button-gradient-primary.$description: Convex pillow gradient — visible 3D depth on buttons

hero-gradient.$description: Human green gradient — single-hue, varying intensity for depth

composite.$description: W3C DTCG composite tokens — bundled multi-value types

typography.$description: Typography tokens — font families, sizes, weights, line-heights, letter-spacing, and type roles

2xs.$description: 10px — smallest readable size, used for badges and secondary metadata

letterSpacing.$description: Optical size compensation — tighter tracking at larger sizes

typeRole.$description: Named type roles — paired size, weight, lineHeight, and tracking

motion.$description: Motion tokens — duration, easing, spring, choreography, and purpose-based transitions

ambient.$description: Ambient background animations (drift, gradient) — not UI interaction

spring-out.$description: CSS linear() approximation of spring(stiffness:200, damping:20)

spring-bounce.$description: CSS linear() with slight bounce overshoot

emphasize.$description: Material 3 standard — dramatic deceleration without overshoot

emphasize-overshoot.$description: Material 3 expressive — deceleration with spring overshoot for hero moments

spring.$description: CSS cubic-bezier spring approximation — overshoot with quick settle for buttons, toggles, cards

spring-gentle.$description: Gentle spring — subtle overshoot for modals, panels, hover states

spring.$description: Physics-based spring parameters for native platforms and JS animation libs

interactive.$description: Interactive elements — buttons, toggles, list items (response 0.35, dampingFraction 0.86)

purpose.$description: Purpose-based motion presets for specific interaction types

reduced-motion.$description: Alternative values when prefers-reduced-motion: reduce is active

micro-physics.$description: Pixar-inspired micro-physics presets — anticipation, follow-through, squash/stretch for UI elements

button-press.$description: Squash on press — slight horizontal expand, vertical compress

button-release.$description: Stretch on release — vertical overshoot before settling

card-hover.$description: Subtle lift on hover — perceived lightness

dropdown-anticipate.$description: Dropdown compresses from origin before expanding

secondary-delay.$description: Pixar secondary action — subsidiary elements react after primary, creating depth

secondary-damping.$description: Secondary action damping ratio — slightly underdamped for follow-through

container-transform.$description: Material 3-style container transforms — one element morphs into another

scale-start.$description: Origin container starts at this scale during morph

path-motion.$description: Arc and curve motion for elements following natural paths instead of straight lines

arc-easing.$description: Natural arc path easing — elements travel along a curve

offset-distance-start.$description: CSS offset-distance start for path-based motion

offset-distance-end.$description: CSS offset-distance end for path-based motion

view-transition.$description: Native View Transitions API tokens for page/view transitions

haptic.$description: Haptic feedback tokens mapped to micro-physics presets — native platforms only (iOS UIImpactFeedbackGenerator, Android HapticFeedbackType)

light.$description: Light tap — button press, toggle, list item select

medium.$description: Medium impact — connection events, significant state changes

heavy.$description: Heavy impact — destructive actions, major transitions

success.$description: Success notification — task complete, connection established

warning.$description: Warning notification — failed action, connection lost

selection.$description: Selection change — picker scroll, settings toggle, tab switch

subtle.$description: Backgrounds, nav chrome, ambient panels — z.raised (100)

prominent.$description: Modals, sheets, hero elements, overlays — z.modal (1300)

chat.$description: Chat-specific glass — blue-tinted for sessions panel and message actions

border-color.$description: Default glass surface border color — warm cream tint, emitted as --hu-glass-border-color

chromatic-spread.$description: Chromatic aberration spread for prismatic edge on prominent glass

components.$description: Component-level token overrides — radius, padding, typography, min sizes

opacity.$description: Opacity tokens — state layers, overlays, and disabled states

elevation.$description: Elevation tokens — shadow definitions mapped to semantic levels
